summary: Completed comprehensive backend testing of RAMP Command Centre MVP. All system endpoints, HOW/WHERE lens APIs, and event flow verification tests passed successfully.
passed_tests: System health check at /api/system/health - returns healthy status with RAMP initialization
Seed demo data at POST /api/system/seed - successfully creates demo organization, sites, systems, and assets
Simulate active drift at POST /api/system/demo/simulate-drift - creates 104 signals, 1 baseline, 2 active states, 2 priorities
HOW lens GET /api/how/priorities - returns 2 active priorities with proper structure and drivers
HOW lens GET /api/how/assets/{asset_id}/state - returns asset state with 2 active states and recent history
HOW lens POST /api/how/interventions - creates intervention and freezes baseline for verification
HOW lens POST /api/how/interventions/complete - marks intervention complete and starts verification
WHERE lens GET /api/where/priorities/summary - returns portfolio summary with priority distribution (1 MEDIUM, 1 LOW) and economic impact ($60.78 VaR, $48.62 VR per day)
WHERE lens GET /api/where/sites/{site_id}/states - returns site state distribution (tested with site-factory-001)
Event flow verification - confirmed complete chain: Signal ingestion → Baseline establishment → State creation → Priority generation
